commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a `review:local` workflow, Codex local preflight script, optional local-review skill, documentation, and local-only Codex auth and Windows launcher handling.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this PR adds a new local review workflow. The PR body provides terminal proof for `codex:local:check` and a completed `review:local` run, and CI covers the focused regression paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is maintainer acceptance of the new local review workflow and auth-support surface, not a narrow repair that automation should patch.

target.title: [codex] Add local ClawSweeper review workflow
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a local ClawSweeper review workflow for maintainers who want advisory output before PR submission or re-review.  This was based on a discussion with @joshavant on discord

## Changes

- Add `pnpm run review:local` for read-only local issue/PR review without the starter GitHub comment.
- Add `pnpm run codex:local:check` to verify local Codex CLI auth and execution without printing secrets.
- Preserve local Codex auth only for `--local-only`; hosted/normal workers still strip Codex/OpenAI/GitHub write credentials.
- Prefer the Windows Codex app binary for local-only review and support Node-shebang Codex shims on Windows.
- Add `.agents/skills/local-clawsweeper-review` as an optional ergonomic Codex wrapper.
- Add `docs/local-clawsweeper-review.md`, including one-PR-at-a-time setup, CLI auth, clean target checkout guidance, and embedded optional skill contents.

## Validation

- `pnpm run build:all`
- `python C:\Users\marti\.codex\skills\.system\skill-creator\scripts\quick_validate.py .agents\skills\local-clawsweeper-review`
- `pnpm run codex:local:check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check scripts/check-local-codex.mjs src/clawsweeper.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts test/codex-process.test.ts`
- `pnpm run lint:src`
- `pnpm run lint:scripts`
- `node --test test\codex-process.test.ts`
- `node --test --test-name-pattern "runCodex honors env login config|review command leaves Codex login method|Codex login method" test\clawsweeper.test.ts`
- `node --test --test-name-pattern "runCodex accepts valid structured output after non-zero Codex exit" test\clawsweeper.test.ts`
- Local review proof: `pnpm run review:local -- --target-repo openclaw/openclaw --target-dir C:\oc-work\clawsweeper-local-target-openclaw --item-number 96138 --batch-size 1 --shard-count 1 --max-pages 1 --artifact-dir C:\oc-work\clawsweeper-source\artifacts\local-review-96138-cleanbranch-20260623 --codex-model gpt-5.5 --codex-reasoning-effort high --codex-timeout-ms 600000`

Local review result for #96138: `review_status=complete`, `decision=keep_open`, `confidence=high`, `review_service_tier=fast`; starter comment was skipped.

Note: `pnpm run test:unit` on this Windows checkout currently hits an existing CRLF-sensitive workflow fixture assertion; the previous Linux CI run reached coverage and only failed `format:check` on `scripts/check-local-codex.mjs` and `src/clawsweeper.ts`, which are now covered by the touched-file format check above.
target.author: brokemac79

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
